category_sources: source_facts.description says fanyi is a Chinese and English translate tool for the command line.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title presents the display name as Fānyì (翻译); source_facts.name provides fanyi.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository; the repository README contains install, usage, and configuration documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository, and source_facts.repo is empty so repo was determined from the official homepage.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Chinese/English CLI translation; official GitHub README topics include nodejs, translator, translation, command-line, and chinese.
